channel.title: 行业动态 on jaxiu He
channel.description: Recent content in 行业动态 on jaxiu He

item.title: 每日技术热点 - 2026年03月06日
item.description: 每天整理当日技术领域重要新闻，带你快速掌握行业动态。数据来源：Hacker News、Dev.to、GitHub 等。 🔥 Hacker News 热门 TOP 10 序号 新闻标题 链接 1 this css proves me human 查看 2 Art Bits from HyperCard 查看 3 The Shady World of IP Leasing 查看 4 The worst acquisition in history, again 查看 5 TypeScript 6.0 RC 查看 6 Ada 2022 查看 7 Anthropic, please make a new Slack 查看 8 Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 查看 9 Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 查看 10 Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 查看 💻 Dev.to 热门文章 序号 文章标题 1 Join the 2026 WeCoded Challenge and Celebrate Underrepresented Voices in Tech Through Writing \u0026 Frontend Art 🎨! 2 What
